name: gateway
description: Self-hosted certificate manager and reverse proxy gateway

scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.dev:infra: mkdir -p /tmp/gateway-nginx-config /tmp/gateway-nginx-certs /tmp/gateway-nginx-logs /tmp/gateway-acme-challenge && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker cp nginx/nginx.conf gateway-nginx-1:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf && docker cp nginx/default.conf gateway-nginx-1:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf && docker cp nginx/html/. gateway-nginx-1:/usr/share/nginx/html/ && docker exec gateway-nginx-1 nginx -s reload
